meta.problem: Every Monday I spend ~3 hours pulling competitor pricing and feature changes into a digest for the team.

agent.name: competitor-digest
agent.model_rationale: Newest Opus-class — the default; quality first, a weekly run still costs cents.
agent.system_summary: Researches the 5 named competitors' public sites, pricing pages, and changelogs; writes a weekly digest to /mnt/session/outputs/digest.md.
never_dos: Never contact anyone or post anywhere — research and drafting only
Never present guesses as facts; mark anything unverified

outcome.description: Produce this week's competitor digest as digest.md
rubric_criteria: digest.md exists and covers all 5 competitors listed in the kickoff
Every pricing or feature change has a source link
Each competitor section ends with a one-line 'so what for us'
Anything unchanged since last week is listed in one 'no movement' line, not padded out
No claim appears without a source or an explicit 'unverified' tag

connections.notes: v0 uses public web only. Roadmap: Notion MCP + vault credential to read the internal strategy page.

stores.name: competitor-history
stores.purpose: What each competitor looked like last week, so the agent reports changes rather than re-describing everything.

cases.name: week-of-may-25
cases.expected: The digest Lamis wrote by hand that week

evals.notes: Case 1 is the v0 input; the other two are held back as a regression check before promoting any new agent version.

defaults_applied.write_actions: None in v0 — the agent drafts, humans send

interface.how: Digest lands as a file; Lamis pastes it into Slack for now. Console for run history.

next_directions.what: Let the agent post the digest to Slack itself
next_directions.why_deferred: Write-action to an external system — kept human-in-the-loop for v0
next_directions.how: Add the Slack MCP server + a vault credential; gate the toolset always_ask so Lamis approves each post

next_directions.what: Pull the internal strategy doc into context
next_directions.why_deferred: Needs a Notion credential that wasn't on hand during the session
next_directions.how: Notion MCP server + vault mcp_oauth credential; reference the doc in the kickoff

next_directions.what: Lock networking down to only the competitor sites
next_directions.why_deferred: Hardening — unrestricted is fine while the agent is read-only
next_directions.how: Switch the environment to networking: limited with the competitor domains in allowed_hosts

next_directions.what: Re-run the 3 eval cases before promoting any new agent version
next_directions.why_deferred: Process habit, not a build task
next_directions.how: Run evals/run-evals.sh against the new version; only update the deployment when verdicts hold
